title: A vehicle surveillance system by lpr camera
abstract: The present invention provides a method and a system for recognizing and fining the cars without official documents, such as smog test/inspection certificate or other official documents, by using a license plate camera. The camera is mounted on a pillar (or alike) on roads, parking lots, streets, etc. The target vehicle may be moving or stationary. The system also includes at least one server with a database. For inspection certification process, data from the inspection center, including data of inspection devices, are transferred to the remote server by communication link and equipments for processing, where the processing result is used in the vehicle's inspection certification processes. After capturing the image by the camera, an image- processing software analyzes the images and extracts the plate information. This data are then matched, by a processor, with license plate numbers which reside in a license plate number database. Every license plate number in the database is related to a record containing information about the vehicle/the owner of the vehicle/ and the official records of the vehicle such as smog test/inspection status/ registration/insurance/theft status etc.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1- A surveillance system to identify violent vehicles comprising: a camera for capturing images of the vehicle; an image processing software that analyzes the images and extracts the vehicle information; a data center which processes the whole data and suggest appropriate action if the results of the processing shows that the vehicle lacks at least one official document; a communication link between the camera and the data center. 2- A surveillance system to identify violent vehicles according to claim 1 futher comprising a technical inspection system. 3- A surveillance system to identify violent vehicles according to claims 1 and 2, wherein the official documents is an inspection certificate. 4- A surveillance system to identify violent vehicles according to claims 1 and 2, wherein the official documents is a registratioen document. 5- A surveillance system to identify violent vehicles according to claims 1 and 2 , wherein the official document is an insurance document. 6- A surveillance system to identify violent vehicles according to claims 1 and 2 , where the communication link is is a wireless link. 7- A surveillance system to identify violent vehicles according to claims 1 and 2, where the communication link is is a cellular network. 8- A surveillance system to identify violent vehicles according to claims 1 and 2 , where the communication link is a telecom network. 9- A surveillance system to identify violent vehicles according to claims 1 and 2 , where the communication link is the internet . 10- A surveillance system to identify violent vehicles according to claims l and 2 wherein the said data center comprising a server, at least one storage unit, and one or more reporting units. 11- A method for identifying and fining a vehicle without one or more necessary official documents, using image captured by camera, analyzing the image by an image -processing software , finding the license plate number in the image, comparing the said plate number with the data within the database, recognizing the vehicle lacks one or more of the official documents and suggesting the appropriate action. 12- A method for identifying and fining a vehicle according to claim 11 further comprising sending information of the technical test results of the vehicle through communication interface from the inspection equipment to the data center , and sending the image information of the camera to a server that is associated with the database via a communication link, and comparing and processing these information to recognize the vehicles which are being utilized while lacking of the technical test certificate , and suggesting the appropriate action. 13- A method for identifying and fining a vehicle according to claimll further comprising sending the information of the vehicle insurance status from the insurance department through communication interface, and sending the image information of the camera to a server (or to a data center) that is associated with the database via a communication link, and comparing and processing these information to recognize the vehicles which are being utilized while lacking of the insurance document, and suggesting the appropriate action. 14- A method for identifying and fining a vehicle according to claimll further comprising sending the information of the of the vehicle through communication interface from the to the data center, , and vehicle registration from related offices, to the data center, and sending the image information of the camera to a server that is associated with the database via a communication link, and comparing and processing these information to recognize the vehicles which are being utilized while lacking the registration ocument and suggesting the appropriate action.
